{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/lamp.png
|block_health=10
|tool=[[Pickaxe]]
}}

Lamps are light blocks crafted with torches and iron ingots.

== Obtaining ==
Lamps can be crafted with 1 torch and 2 iron ingots, producing a lamp matching the type of torch used.

== Usage ==
Coal lamps produce a warm yellowish light, while sulfur lamps produce a blue light. Lamps are brighter than lanterns.

== History ==
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

[[Category:Light Blocks]]
[[Category:Blocks]]
